marketing_seeds: For small HR departments in accounting firms processing 5–15 payroll summaries/month, manual timesheet entry causes formatting errors and delays in payroll processing. We automate the conversion of timesheet entries into formatted payroll summaries instead of manual entry and formatting in spreadsheets.
